name: Wysee Split Light
baseStyles: font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.75; color: #1c2230; background: #f4f6ff;

elementStyles.h1: font-size: 1.85em; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 0.5em 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #7070bb; padding-bottom: 0.3em; color: #19206b;
elementStyles.h2: font-size: 1.3em; font-weight: 700; margin: 1.4em 0 0.4em 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #c4c8ef; padding-bottom: 0.2em; color: #31377a;
elementStyles.h3: font-size: 1.1em; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; margin: 1em 0 0.3em 0; color: #31377a;
elementStyles.h4: font-size: 1em; font-weight: 700; margin: 0.8em 0 0.3em 0; color: #4c5670; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
elementStyles.blockquote: border-left: 3px solid #7070bb; padding: 0.3em 0 0.3em 1.2em; margin: 1em 0; color: #4c5670; font-style: italic; background: rgba(112,112,187,0.08); border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
elementStyles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 1.2em 0; font-size: 0.94em; background: #fbfbff; border: 1px solid #cfd4f7; border-radius: 6px;
elementStyles.th: font-weight: 700; text-align: left; padding: 0.55em 0.9em; font-size: 0.9em; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
elementStyles.codeInline: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.88em; background: #eef1ff; color: #c56a00; padding: 0.15em 0.4em; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid #cfd4f7;
elementStyles.pre: background: #f8faff; border: 1px solid #cfd4f7; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1em 1.2em; overflow-x: auto; margin: 1em 0;
elementStyles.codeBlock: font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.88em; color: #24304d;
